section.heading: Exporter assistance initiative

content.p: To provide a comprehensive source of information to facilitate exports of United States agricultural commodities, the Secretary shall maintain on a website on the Internet information to assist exporters and potential exporters of United States agricultural commodities.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 95–501, title I, § 107, as added Pub. L. 107–171, title III, § 3101, May 13, 2002, 116 Stat. 288.)
